title: Phase 3D: Admin - feature flags and branch settings
description: Build feature flag management: list page, detail page with assignments by company/branch/role/user, API routes, and service. Build branch settings page with API.
steps: Create src/lib/services/feature-flag.service.ts with flag CRUD, assignment management
Create src/app/api/feature-flags/route.ts with GET and POST endpoints
Create src/app/api/feature-flags/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT, DELETE endpoints
Create src/app/(dashboard)/admin/feature-flags/[id]/page.tsx with flag detail and assignment editor
Create src/app/api/settings/branch/route.ts with branch settings API
